case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. REYNA BELTRAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210053404) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
